calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up; Declaration Of Lee M. Mendelson
Off Calendar Jun-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Grigoriy Arutyunyan.
Dept. 514. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

M. Todd Jenks, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Suntrust Bank, a corporation.
No appearance by defendant Grigoriy Arutyunyan.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract/Open Book Account was filed on February 23, 2018, and personally served on defendant Grigoriy Arutyunyan on March 23, 2018.
Default as to defendant Grigoriy Arutyunyan was entered on June 7, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 20, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 4, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Suntrust Bank, a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Grigoriy Arutyunyan, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,447.17.
Attorney Fees - $960.00.
Costs - $575.00.

Total - $27,982.17.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Continued To Jul-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up; Declaration Of Lee M. Mendelson
Off Calendar Apr-22-2019 Continued To Jun-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
